title: [Owner Proof Input]: license/no-reuse + one weak artifact
body:
Status: fixture candidate owner input, not owner decision or proof.

This fixture models what a filled issue #7 could look like after owner review. It is only a local smoke fixture for the private export path.

## 1. license_or_no_reuse

- [x] Reuse allowed after adding a new license

Notes:

```text
Fixture candidate: owner plans to add an explicit repository license before reuse. This is not legal advice and not the final license decision.
```

## 2. weak_artifact_permission

Bring one weak artifact: one owner-submitted, permissioned, or clearly redacted artifact that is weak enough to improve and safe enough to review.

Artifact/excerpt/path/link:

```text
Fixture weak artifact: a redacted draft README paragraph that needs transformation into a clearer before/after Mimesis case.
```

Artifact owner:

```text
Fixture owner
```

Publication preference:

- [x] Anonymized

Redaction requirements:

```text
Remove identifying names, customer details, credentials, and private operational context before any public case candidate.
```

Proof boundary, meaning what this artifact/case must not claim:

```text
Do not claim customer proof, adoption, benchmarked productivity, publication, license grant, or gate closure from this fixture.
```

## Safety Confirmation

- [x] I did not include secrets, passwords, tokens, or private customer data.
- [x] I own or control the submitted artifact, or I have permission to submit the shown redacted excerpt/path/link for review.
- [x] I understand this issue does not grant permission, approve proof, publish, or close gates.
